name: deploy_vercel
description: Deploys the current project to Vercel. Assumes Vercel CLI is installed and configured (logged in, project linked or can be linked). This tool will typically run 'vercel deploy --prod' or a similar command.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project to deploy.

vercel_token.description: Optional Vercel authentication token. If not provided, assumes CLI is already authenticated or will prompt interactively (if possible). For non-interactive environments, this is crucial.

team_id.description: Optional Vercel Team ID if deploying to a specific team.

project_name_override.description: Optional name to use for the Vercel project. If not provided, Vercel CLI typically infers it.

production.description: If true (default), deploys to production (e.g., 'vercel deploy --prod'). If false, creates a preview deployment.

hints.description: This tool is destructive as it creates or updates a deployment on Vercel. Not idempotent.
